gist.headline: Watering the Apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all the amazing community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and README up-to-date with the latest community usage and health data.
gist.visual_concept: A robot and the bee checking on plants (representing apps) in a greenhouse. The robot has a clipboard or a screen showing charts, symbolizing the automated metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny gardener's hat. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny gardener's hat. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes.
